'''ngaraga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvanite|uvanite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvanite|uvanite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngaraga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngærægæth|ngærægæth]] || [[word:ngærægæj|ngærægæj]] || [[word:ngærægæsh|ngærægæsh]] || [[word:ngærægæ|ngærægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngararagath|ngararagath]] || [[word:ngararagaj|ngararagaj]] || [[word:ngararagash|ngararagash]] || [[word:ngararaga|ngararaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaragath|ngaragath]] || [[word:ngaragaj|ngaragaj]] || [[word:ngaragash|ngaragash]] || [[word:ngaraga|ngaraga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarafgath|ngarafgath]] || [[word:ngarafgaj|ngarafgaj]] || [[word:ngarafgash|ngarafgash]] || [[word:ngarafgaf|ngarafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaragatha|ngaragatha]] || [[word:ngaragaja|ngaragaja]] || [[word:ngaragasha|ngaragasha]] || [[word:ngaragaka|ngaragaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaragath|ngaragath]] || [[word:ngaragaj|ngaragaj]] || [[word:ngaragash|ngaragash]] || [[word:ngaraga|ngaraga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaragathal|ngaragathal]] || [[word:ngaragajal|ngaragajal]] || [[word:ngaragashal|ngaragashal]] || [[word:ngaragakal|ngaragakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaragathatha|ngaragathatha]] || [[word:ngaragajaja|ngaragajaja]] || [[word:ngaragashasha|ngaragashasha]] || [[word:ngaragaka|ngaragaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaragathan|ngaragathan]] || [[word:ngaragajan|ngaragajan]] || [[word:ngaragashan|ngaragashan]] || [[word:ngaragakan|ngaragakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaragathaoro|ngaragathaoro]] || [[word:ngaragajaoro|ngaragajaoro]] || [[word:ngaragashaoro|ngaragashaoro]] || [[word:ngaragakaoro|ngaragakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
